title: FedRAMP Significant Change Notification (SCN-CSO-INF)
description: Required information for a Significant Change Notification per SCN-CSO-INF. Note per the rule: structure of the information may vary depending on how the provider tracks this internally.

assessorName.title: Assessor Name
assessorName.description: Name of the assessor involved in this change, if applicable.

relatedVulnerability.title: Related Vulnerability
relatedVulnerability.description: Identifier or description of any related vulnerability driving this change, if applicable.

changeType.title: Type
changeType.description: Significant change type per SCN-CSO-EVA. Routine recurring changes (SCN-RTR) do not require a Significant Change Notification.

changeTypeExplanation.title: Categorization Explanation
changeTypeExplanation.description: Explanation of why this change was categorized as the selected type.

customerImpact.title: Customer Impact
customerImpact.description: Summary of customer impact, including changes to services and customer configuration responsibilities.

planAndTimeline.title: Plan and Timeline
planAndTimeline.description: Plan and timeline for the change, including verification, assessment, and/or validation of impacted Key Security Indicators (KSIs) or Rev5 Controls.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: Human readable summary of the timeline and plan for the change. May use Markdown for formatting.

plannedStart.title: Planned Start
plannedStart.description: The first date on which changes will be made to the system.

plannedCompletion.title: Planned Completion
plannedCompletion.description: The date on which the changes will be considered complete. This should include any planned testing and monitoring activities.

milestones.title: Milestones
milestones.description: Milestones for the change, including dates and descriptions.

milestoneDescription.title: Description
milestoneDescription.description: Human readable description of the milestone.

targetDate.title: Target Date
targetDate.description: The date on which the milestone is expected to be completed.

impactedControls.title: Impacted KSIs or Rev5 Controls
impactedControls.description: KSI or control identifiers that will be verified, assessed, or validated as part of this change.

impactAnalysis.title: Business or Security Impact Analysis
impactAnalysis.description: Copy or summary of the business or security impact analysis. May be the full text or a URI referencing the document.
